title: Build crates/tui/ Phase 1: geometry, style, cell buffer, terminal
description: Start crates/tui/ general-purpose library per ai/design/tui-lib-spec.md. Phase 1: geometry.rs (Position, Rect, Size), style.rs (Style, Color, StyleModifiers), buffer.rs (Cell, Buffer, diff, to_lines), terminal.rs (Terminal, RenderMode inline/fullscreen). Deliverable: colored grid renders to terminal.
